text:
NCH 

VALUES: 10 = Aged without end-stage renal disease (ESRD) 
11 = Aged with ESRD 
20 = Disabled without ESRD 21 = Disabled with ESRD 
31 = ESRD only 

COMMENT: Analysts can use this variable to quickly distinguish between the aged, disabled, and ESRD populations. 

This field is coded from age, original reason for entitlement, current reason for entitlement and ESRD 
indicator contained in the enrollment data base at CMS, as of the claim through date. 
 ^ Back to TOC ^
